note: Per-run records. worldgen = macro-averaged per-block-class accuracy vs the real Java game over 10 time-seeds drawn after the run froze (v0 scores the worldgen leg; sim tick-trace and fidelity-gated SPS land next). Board reset 2026-07-08: earlier rows were scored on 2 seeds, too noisy for cross-run deltas; runs are being redone under prompt v2 + 10-seed scoring. Prior numbers live in git history and DEVLOG.md. Raw artifacts: benchmarks/rewrite/results/runs/.
